parameters.name: file
parameters.label: Geometry File
parameters.description: Contains the full pathname of the geometry file to be read in.

parameters.name: flipfacing
parameters.label: Flip Primitive Faces
parameters.description: Flips the primitive faces of the geometry.

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals if None Exist
parameters.description: Creates normals if the geometry does not have them.

parameters.name: refresh
parameters.label: Refresh
parameters.description: Reload the file when this parameter is set to On.
